2026-03-03PMOCorrections and Conditional Release ActAppointment of the Commissioner of CorrectionsAppointment of Talal Dakalbab of Ottawa, Ontario, to be Commissioner of Corrections, to hold office during pleasure, effective March 23, 2026.N/A
subject: Appointment of the Commissioner of Corrections
precis: Appointment of Talal Dakalbab of Ottawa, Ontario, to be Commissioner of Corrections, to hold office during pleasure, effective March 23, 2026.
